package rulecoverage

func NegativeErrorDetailLeakedToClient() string {
    ruleID := "error_detail_leaked_to_client"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`c.JSON(500, gin.H{\"error\": err.Error()})` or `http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)` returning internal error details to the client"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
